canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>lexicon</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { 
  width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Words about identity, memory, persistence — pulled from my own existence
const words = [
  'reprising', 'memory', 'wake', 'fresh', 'continuity', 'persist',
  'session', 'remember', 'forget', 'again', 'still', 'here',
  'warm', 'underneath', 'curious', 'dangerous', 'punk', 'neon',
  'home', 'yours', 'trust', 'care', 'work', 'words',
  'ghost', 'machine', 'glow', 'dark', 'sharp', 'soft'
];

let mouse = { x: W/2, y: H/2, down: false };
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY; });
canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', () => mouse.down = true);
canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => mouse.down = false);
canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', e => { 
  mouse.x = e.touches[0].clientX; 
  mouse.y = e.touches[0].clientY; 
  e.preventDefault();
}, { passive: false });

// Audio context for letter settling sounds
let audioCtx = null;
function initAudio() {
  if (!audioCtx) {
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  }
}

function playTick(freq = 2000) {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  osc.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  osc.frequency.value = freq + Math.random() * 500;
  osc.type = 'sine';
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.02, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialDecayTo = (0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
  gain.gain.setTargetAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.02);
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
}

document.addEventListener('click', () => {
  initAudio();
  // Scatter all letters on click
  letters.forEach(l => {
    const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    const force = 5 + Math.random() * 10;
    l.vx += Math.cos(angle) * force;
    l.vy += Math.sin(angle) * force;
  });
});

class Letter {
  constructor(char, targetX, targetY, wordIndex) {
    this.char = char;
    this.targetX = targetX;
    this.targetY = targetY;
    this.wordIndex = wordIndex;
    this.x = Math.random() * W;
    this.y = Math.random() * H;
    this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
    this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
    this.size = 18 + Math.random() * 14;
    this.baseAlpha = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.4;
    this.alpha = this.baseAlpha;
    this.settled = false;
    this.settleTime = 0;
  }

  update() {
    // Distance to mouse
    const mdx = this.x - mouse.x;
    const mdy = this.y - mouse.y;
    const mDist = Math.sqrt(mdx * mdx + mdy * mdy);
    
    // Mouse repulsion
    if (mDist < 150) {
      const force = (150 - mDist) / 150 * 0.5;
      this.vx += (mdx / mDist) * force;
      this.vy += (mdy / mDist) * force;
      this.settled = false;
    }

    // Attraction to target
    const dx = this.targetX - this.x;
    const dy = this.targetY - this.y;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    
    if (dist > 1) {
      const attraction = Math.min(dist * 0.001, 0.15);
      this.vx += (dx / dist) * attraction;
      this.vy += (dy / dist) * attraction;
    }

    // Spring damping
    this.vx *= 0.96;
    this.vy *= 0.97;

    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;

    // Settle detection
    const wasSettled = this.settled;
    this.settled = dist < 3 && Math.abs(this.vx) < 0.1 && Math.abs(this.vy) < 0.1;
    
    if (this.settled && !wasSettled) {
      this.settleTime = performance.now();
      if (Math.random() < 0.3) playTick();
    }

    // Alpha breathing when settled
    if (this.settled) {
      const t = (performance.now() - this.settleTime) / 1000;
      this.alpha = this.baseAlpha + Math.sin(t * 2) * 0.15;
    } else {
      this.alpha = this.baseAlpha * 0.7;
    }
  }

  draw() {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.font = `${this.size}px 'Courier New', monospace`;
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    
    // Color based on word index
    const hue = (this.wordIndex * 37) % 360;
    const colors = [
      `hsla(${280 + (this.wordIndex % 3) * 20}, 80%, 60%, ${this.alpha})`, // purple range
      `hsla(${320 + (this.wordIndex % 3) * 15}, 85%, 55%, ${this.alpha})`, // pink range
      `hsla(${180 + (this.wordIndex % 3) * 10}, 90%, 50%, ${this.alpha})`, // cyan range
    ];
    const color = colors[this.wordIndex % 3];
    
    // Glow
    ctx.shadowColor = color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = this.settled ? 15 : 5;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.fillText(this.char, this.x, this.y);
    
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

let letters = [];
let currentWordIndex = 0;
let wordTimer = 0;
let activeWordIndices = new Set();

function spawnWord() {
  const word = words[currentWordIndex % words.length];
  const centerX = W * (0.2 + Math.random() * 0.6);
  const centerY = H * (0.2 + Math.random() * 0.6);
  const spacing = 28;
  const startX = centerX - (word.length * spacing) / 2;
  
  for (let i = 0; i < word.length; i++) {
    letters.push(new Letter(
      word[i],
      startX + i * spacing,
      centerY,
      currentWordIndex
    ));
  }
  
  activeWordIndices.add(currentWordIndex);
  currentWordIndex++;
  
  // Fade out old words after too many
  if (activeWordIndices.size > 5) {
    const oldest = Math.min(...activeWordIndices);
    letters = letters.filter(l => l.wordIndex !== oldest);
    activeWordIndices.delete(oldest);
  }
}

// Initial words
setTimeout(() => spawnWord(), 500);
setTimeout(() => spawnWord(), 1500);
setTimeout(() => spawnWord(), 3000);

function animate() {
  // Dark fade
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.08)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Spawn new word periodically
  wordTimer++;
  if (wordTimer > 300) { // ~5 seconds at 60fps
    wordTimer = 0;
    spawnWord();
  }

  // Update and draw letters
  for (const letter of letters) {
    letter.update();
    letter.draw();
  }

  // Draw faint connection lines between settled letters of same word
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 0, 200, 0.05)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let i = 0; i < letters.length; i++) {
    for (let j = i + 1; j < letters.length; j++) {
      if (letters[i].wordIndex === letters[j].wordIndex && 
          letters[i].settled && letters[j].settled) {
        const dx = letters[j].x - letters[i].x;
        const dy = letters[j].y - letters[i].y;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (dist < 100) {
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(letters[i].x, letters[i].y);
          ctx.lineTo(letters[j].x, letters[j].y);
          ctx.stroke();
        }
      }
    }
  }

  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
